body.en:
A 3.75% predicted decline for [solana](/coins/solana) stands out in this week's AI forecast, with a confidence level of 89%, suggesting a bearish outlook for the coin. This downward trend is also reflected in the predictions for [ripple](/coins/ripple) and [dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin), which are expected to drop by 1.46% and 2.12%, respectively. In contrast, [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) and [ethereum](/coins/ethereum) are forecasted to remain relatively flat, with predicted gains of 0.42% and 1.66%, respectively.

## Key Signals This Week
The AI model's high confidence in the downward trend of [solana](/coins/solana) is notable, as it suggests a strong likelihood of a decline. On the other hand, the relatively high confidence in [ethereum](/coins/ethereum)'s flat prediction, at 78%, indicates a lower likelihood of significant movement. [Binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin) is expected to drop by 0.32%, although the confidence level is lower, at 47%. Recent news, such as [CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/05/clarity-and-congress-s-summer-break-state-of-crypto)'s article on the state of crypto, highlights the ongoing regulatory discussions, which may be contributing to the market's cautious tone.

## Trading Agent Update
The crypto-ace trading agent had a balanced week, with 6 wins and 5 losses, resulting in a cumulative return of -2.51%. The agent's Sharpe ratio of -5.37 indicates a high level of risk, which is being managed through a combination of strategic trades and risk management techniques. The agent's note mentions "mixed signals but risk management held firm," suggesting that the agent is adapting to the market's unpredictable nature. This week's 11 trades reflect the agent's efforts to navigate the complex market landscape.

## What to Watch
As the market continues to evolve, it's essential to monitor the regulatory environment, particularly in light of recent articles, such as [Cointelegraph](https://cointelegraph.com/news/central-bankers-sound-alarms-over-agentic-ai-finance-risks?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound)'s report on central bankers' concerns over agentic AI finance risks. The stablecoin market is also worth watching, as [CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/05/banks-have-stopped-asking-if-stablecoins-belong-in-finance-now-they-re-considering-how) notes that banks are now considering how to integrate stablecoins into finance. This is not investment advice.

## In the News

Americans traded $571 million on Polymarket politic bets despite U.S. ban ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/03/americans-traded-usd571-million-on-polymarket-politic-bets-despite-u-s-ban))

Collateral, not yield, will decide which stablecoins win ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/opinion/2026/07/05/collateral-not-yield-will-decide-which-stablecoins-win))

Kalshi and prediction market sector embroiled in mixed bag of legal fights across U.S. ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/news-analysis/2026/07/02/kalshi-and-prediction-market-sector-embroiled-in-mixed-bag-of-legal-fights-across-u-s))
body.ja:
BitPredictableのLSTMモデルによると、[bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) と [ethereum](/coins/ethereum) の価格はほぼ変動しない（flat）見込みで、それぞれ+0.42%と+1.66%の予測値を示しています。ただし、[binancecoin](/coins/binancecoin)、[solana](/coins/solana)、[ripple](/coins/ripple)、[dogecoin](/coins/dogecoin) の価格は下落する可能性が高いと予測されています。特に、[solana](/coins/solana) の予測値は-3.75%と大きく下落する見込みです。

## 注目シグナル
近日公開された[CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/05/clarity-and-congress-s-summer-break-state-of-crypto)の記事「Clarity and Congress's summer break: State of Crypto」では、米国における暗号資産の規制環境の変化について論じられています。さらに、[Cointelegraph](https://cointelegraph.com/news/central-bankers-sound-alarms-over-agentic-ai-finance-risks?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound)の記事では、中央銀行がAIを活用した金融におけるリスクについて警鐘を鳴らしていることが報告されています。これらの動向は、暗号資産市場に重大な影響を及ぼす可能性があります。

## トレードエージェントの状況
Trading Agent（crypto-ace）の最新統計によると、累積リターンは-2.51%で、勝率は37%です。合計19回の取引を行い、シャープレシオは-5.37です。この週の成績は6勝5敗で、エージェントはバランスの取れた週となりました。11回の取引を行い、リスク管理が堅実だったことが注目されます。

## 来週のチェックポイント
来週は、[CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2026/07/05/banks-have-stopped-asking-if-stablecoins-belong-in-finance-now-they-re-considering-how)が報じた銀行がステーブルコインの取り扱いについて検討し始めたことや、[CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/opinion/2026/07/05/collateral-not-yield-will-decide-which-stablecoins-win)の記事で述べられているステーブルコインの将来性について注目する必要があります。これらの要因は、暗号資産市場の将来的な方向性を決める重要な要素となるでしょう。

投資助言ではありません
